narrative:
North Olmsted-01-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,009 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.4 percentage points.
